creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Thankful for the best memories of 2022! 🥹🫶🏻

To our Insta community, whether you’re a silent supporter or a frequent commenter, we have so much love for all of you! YOU are the reason why we still have this passion for blogging after 10 long years!

To all the brands we have worked with this year, THANK YOU for trusting us. You have sparked our creativity and made us realize that we have enough room for growth!

To @edzphotography, my partner-in-whatever, I am grateful for your endless patience and effort to keep up with my crazy ideas. May we create more magic wherever we go in 2023.

😘

#ladyandhersweetescapes #DubaiBlogger #PinayBlogger #UAEblogger #Dubai #UAE #DubaiDestinations #MyDubai #visitDubai

transcription.text: And with that, the 2022 season comes to an end. Good night.
